_comment: Generated by the eval fixture script, then projected into the MEMENTO vector space (text-embedding-3-small truncated to 512 dims and L2-normalized - exactly what toMementoVector does, and what OpenAI's `dimensions` parameter does internally). Committed so the eval is deterministic and runs offline in CI. Regenerate if the corpus text, the model, or MEMENTO_EMBEDDING_DIMS changes.
